input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.8.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: dq - disqualified - run(s) or event(s) no longer valid

D.8.1.3 DQ - Disqualified - run(s) or event(s) no longer valid

final_answer: DQ - Disqualified - run(s) or event(s) no longer valid
